properties.query:
SELECT * 
INTO [KQL_EnvironmentalTelemetry] 
FROM [FarmingTelemetryEventstream-stream]
WHERE event_type = 'environmental' OR event_type = 'EnvironmentalTelemetryEvent'

SELECT * 
INTO [KQL_EquipmentTelemetry] 
FROM [FarmingTelemetryEventstream-stream]
WHERE event_type = 'equipment' OR event_type = 'EquipmentTelemetryEvent'

SELECT * 
INTO [KQL_FacilityOperations] 
FROM [FarmingTelemetryEventstream-stream]
WHERE event_type = 'facility' OR event_type = 'FacilityEvent'

SELECT * 
INTO [KQL_IrrigationTelemetry] 
FROM [FarmingTelemetryEventstream-stream]
WHERE event_type = 'irrigation' OR event_type = 'IrrigationTelemetryEvent'

SELECT * 
INTO [KQL_LightingTelemetry] 
FROM [FarmingTelemetryEventstream-stream]
WHERE event_type = 'lighting' OR event_type = 'LightingTelemetryEvent'
